title: synotis lucorum
intro: Synotis lucorum, also known as the Chinese mountain flower, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Synotis lucorum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for consumption, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine formulas for its medicinal properties.
